channel.title: Real-Time on T Fong
channel.description: Recent content in Real-Time on T Fong

item.title: Tsuki Engine: Vulkan-CUDA Interop Render Engine
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A Vulkan-CUDA interop render engine with a real-time Vulkan viewport and a pathtraced CUDA view, with support for glTF files and physically-based materials

item.title: GPU Boids Flocking Particle Simulator
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A GPU Boids Flocking Particle Simulator written in CUDA.

item.title: Physically-Based Deferred Renderer
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A physically-based deferred renderer in OpenGL and GLSL, with diffuse and glossy convolution for environment map reflections on materials with roughness and metallic factors, and deferred rendering for screen space reflections

item.title: Mini-Minecraft
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: Minecraft clone made in C++, OpenGL, GLSL

item.title: Mesh Editor
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A C++ OpenGL mini mesh-editor implementing the half-edge data structure representation of meshes, with Catmull-Clark subdivision.

item.title: Shader Viewer
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A vertex and fragment shader viewer implementing various materials and post processing effects.

item.title: Curve Editor
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A Curve Editor implementing key interpolation via Bezier curves, Catmull-Rom splines, Hermite splines, and rotational interpolation via quaternion Catmull-Rom splines.

item.title: CPU Rasterizer
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A C++ CPU Rasterizer with Lambertian reflections, wireframe rendering, and FSAA.
